title: Write a Deployment and Service
description: Write a Deployment with 3 replicas and a RollingUpdate strategy, paired with a LoadBalancer Service.
starterCode:
# Write a Deployment manifest that:
# 1. Creates 'web-deployment' in namespace 'production'
# 2. Has 3 replicas with selector/template label: app=web
# 3. Uses image: nginx:1.27, containerPort: 80
# 4. Has RollingUpdate strategy: maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0

# Then write a Service manifest that:
# 5. Name: web-service, namespace: production
# 6. Type: LoadBalancer
# 7. Selects pods with label: app=web
# 8. Maps port 80 -> targetPort 80

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
# Complete the deployment
solutionCode:
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-deployment
  namespace: production
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: nginx
          image: nginx:1.27
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: web-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer
  selector:
    app: web
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 80
hints: strategy.type: RollingUpdate with rollingUpdate.maxSurge and maxUnavailable
Service selector matches the Pod labels (not the Deployment labels)
Use '---' separator between multiple YAML documents in one file

validationRules.errorMessage: YAML is invalid — check indentation and --- separators

simulatedOutput.success:
deployment.apps/web-deployment created
service/web-service created

NAME             READY   UP-TO-DATE   AVAILABLE   AGE
web-deployment   3/3     3            3           30s

NAME          TYPE           CLUSTER-IP     EXTERNAL-IP     PORT(S)
web-service   LoadBalancer   10.96.12.100   52.14.180.200   80:31234/TCP
simulatedOutput.failure: Deployment/Service validation failed. Check replicas, RollingUpdate strategy, Service type, and selector labels.
